description: This strappy number will raise your glam quotient when you pair it with skinny jeans or a little black dress for nights out with the girls. Its sturdy soles and glittery straps are made for strutting around. Heel: 2.5" Upper Soft synthetic leather strap over the forefoot Criss-crossed straps over the midfoot Glitter on the straps Soft silky lining on footbed Ergonomically curved footbed for ease of wear Outsole TPU outsole with mild ridges on the heel and textured grooves on the forefoot for grip Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
